title: Parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter fails

features.name: parameterized class containing typedef
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with a typedef defined inside it, where the typedef uses the class's parameter

features.name: interface with type parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface that takes a type as a parameter with a default value, where that type is used inside the interface

features.name: parameterized class typedef as interface type argument
features.description: Code should include using a parameterized class's typedef accessed via scope resolution operator as an interface type parameter argument

features.name: class scope resolution for typedef access
features.description: Code should include using the class scope resolution operator to access a typedef from a parameterized class specialization
